        OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
 Dear Michael 
        Many thanks indeed for this clear and rapid advice.  Much appreciated. I think it looks spot 
on. 
        
 is duty PS this weekend and will put this to the PM tomorrow morning for 
any steers. It would be helpful to know before we do:
            where DBT SoS is on these questions
            
 
 
 
 Ailsa 
        OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
        From: Michael Ellam 
        Sent: Friday, March 7, 2025 11:07 pm
        To: Ailsa Terry 
; 
 Ninjeri 
Pandit 
; Morgan McSweeney 
; Liz 
Lloyd 
; Olaf Henricson-Bell 
; Matthew 
Doyle 
        Cc: Jonathan Powell 
; Nick Catsaras 
; Sophie Hague 
; 
Black, Jonathan - CO (OFF-SEN) 
; Katy Budge1 
; Peter Mandelson 
; 
Mungo Woodifield 
; 
 
        Subject: US Steel Tariffs
        Please see some advice below in response to the feedback from the Department of 
Commerce earlier today on steel tariffs. This reflects input from HMA Washington and Varun.

@Jonathan Powell @Richard Morris

lines asap?
